matched_to: luxury boutique travel agencies and high-end corporate MICE planners

leads.title: Vice President
leads.headline: Vice President at Huffman Travel
leads.company_address: 1165 N Clark St, Chicago, Illinois, US
leads.company_description: Huffman Travel is a boutique luxury travel consultancy based in the United States, supported by a team of over 20 advisors. They provide bespoke custom itineraries, including hotel bookings, villa rentals, private aviation, and long-term travel planning for a global clientele.

leads.title: Founder | CEO

leads.company_address: 32 Elm Place, Suite 3N, Rye, New York 10580, US
leads.company_description: Voyage By Pascale is a United States-based boutique wholesale company dedicated to serving the luxury travel advisor community. They prioritize professional relationships and integrity to act as a premier partner for advisors seeking to provide their clients with unparalleled luxury travel experiences.

leads.title: Founder, President & CEO
leads.headline: Owner, ID Travel Group

leads.company_description: ID Travel Group is a luxury travel wholesaler and tour operator with a global presence, including offices in the United States, Europe, Africa, and Asia. They specialize in warm-weather destinations, representing elite hotels, resorts, and villas while providing customized safaris, private tours, and concierge services.

leads.title: Founder & Managing Director
leads.headline: Founder & Managing Director at Oenotated Travel
leads.company_description: Oenotated Travel is a United States-based luxury boutique travel advisor and custom tour operator specializing in wine, culinary, and cultural experiences. They provide expert-led services including private vineyard visits, culinary tours, and artisan craft workshops for clients seeking immersive travel.

leads.title: President & CEO
leads.headline: President & CEO at Steele Luxury Travel
leads.company_description: Steele Luxury Travel is a United States-based firm that provides luxury travel experiences to exotic destinations worldwide, often centered around international celebrations and cultural events. They partner with five-star hotels and leading tour operators to deliver culturally rich itineraries for their clients.

leads.company_description: Tripsmiths & TS Tours is a United Kingdom-based operator specializing in exclusive, expert-led tours and itineraries. leads.title: Director
leads.headline: Helentours Concierge Management Ltd - Director
leads.company_description: Helentours Concierge Management Ltd is an award-winning luxury travel advisor and concierge service based in the United Kingdom. leads.title: Managing Director

leads.company_description: MacLean & Bruce is a United Kingdom-based luxury travel company and tour operator specializing in bespoke Scottish experiences. Based in Fife, they focus on whisky-themed travel, providing clients with exclusive distillery access and private tastings curated by industry experts.
